messages.content:
According to the Equivocal8768, to cancel a Vultr subscription, you can do so within your account or contact <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> for assistance. The cancellation becomes effective upon the expiration of your current subscription term. However, it's important to note that subscription fees will not be refunded, in whole or in part, subject to applicable law. Additionally, if you cancel any service before the pre-paid fees expire, Vultr may not issue any refund, including remaining pre-paid fees, set up fees, or special programming fees. Furthermore, if you do not pay on time or if Vultr cannot charge your payment method for any reason, Vultr reserves the right to suspend or terminate your subscription, access to the services, and/or account.

give me email text so i apply for this -cancel a Vultr subscription-

Certainly! Below is a draft email template you can use to send a cancellation request to Vultr via their support email. Make sure to fill in the necessary personal details like your account information, server details, and any other specifics that might apply to your situation.

---

Subject: Request to Cancel Vultr Subscription - [Your Account Name or Number]

Dear Vultr Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am contacting you regarding my Vultr account with the following details:

- Account Name: [Your Account Name]
- Account Email: [Your Account Email Address]
- Server ID(s) or Instance Name(s): [List your Server ID or instance names if applicable]

After careful consideration, I have decided to cancel my Vultr subscription and any related services under my account. Please consider this email as my official notice of cancellation according to the terms of service.

I understand that the cancellation will become effective upon the expiration of the current subscription term and that subscription fees are not refundable, subject to applicable law. I acknowledge that if I cancel any service before pre-paid fees expire, Vultr may not issue a refund for remaining pre-paid fees, setup fees, or any special programming fees.

Please confirm that my cancellation request has been received and processed. I would appreciate a final statement indicating the status of my account and any action required on my part to complete the cancellation process.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter. I look forward to your prompt response confirming the cancellation of my services.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Contact Information]
[Optional: Billing Address Associated with the Account]

---

Ensure that you review Vultr's cancellation policy beforehand, as it may have updated since the information provided to you. Additionally, keep an eye on their terms of service for any changes that might affect your cancellation. It's also a good practice to save a copy of your email and any correspondence with Vultr support for your records.

i email them to cancel my accnount , they said this to me /
Hello,

Thank you for contacting the Vultr Technical Support team. To meet your request, we will need to forward this ticket to our Account Management team. Please allow some additional time while your inquiry is being reviewed.

In the meantime, please feel free to add any helpful feedback to this email. You can also check out https://www.vultr.com/resources/faq/. We look forward to assisting you further!




Sebastian R.
Systems Administrator

The response from Vultr indicates that they have received your initial cancellation request and are now processing it. Their Account Management team will be taking over the matter. It is fairly standard for a service provider to take time to process cancellation requests, especially if they are handling billing and account management matters.

At this stage, you can respond to Sebastian's email with any additional feedback about your experience (if you have any) or simply wait for the Account Management team to contact you. If you want to reply to Sebastian's email, you might write something like this:

---

Subject: Re: Request to Cancel Vultr Subscription - [Your Account Name or Number]

Hello Sebastian,

Thank you for your prompt response to my cancellation request for my Vultr account.

I appreciate the transfer of this matter to your Account Management team and understand there may be additional processing time required. I’m happy to provide any further information needed to assist with the cancellation process.

[You can add any feedback you may have here - e.g., why you are leaving, what could have been done better, or any positive feedback about your experience.]

I look forward to a confirmation from the Account Management team regarding the completion of my subscription cancellation. Please let me know if any further action is required on my part at this juncture.

Thank you once again for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Contact Information]

---

Now, all you need to do is wait for their reply confirming your cancellation request has been processed. Remember to keep checking your email for their response, and if you don't hear back in a timely manner (usually within a few business days), consider following up to inquire about the status of your request.

before i decide to cancel my account they sent this to me /
Hello,

Due to recent activity on your account from a sanctioned country - Iran, Islamic Republic of, our ToS department is requesting additional information to validate your identity.

Please login to your account and complete the following form at: https://my.vultr.com/billing/auth_form/

The following will be required to sufficiently complete the form for verification:
1. A photo of your government ID and
2. A partial photo of your Credit Card showing the last 4 numbers only.

This is a requirement whenever log entires appear from an embargoed/partially embargoed country.

You can find a full list of sanction details at the following URL:
https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/sanctions/programs/pages/programs.aspx

Your prompt attention within 48 hours is appreciated to ensure uninterrupted service.

It seems the email from Vultr is about a compliance issue due to recent activity that appeared to originate from a sanctioned country, Iran. Companies that operate internationally often have to adhere to various regulations, including sanctions imposed by their home country or international bodies. In this case, Vultr is likely based in the United States or operates under U.S. law and must comply with U.S. Treasury sanctions.

They are requesting identity verification to proceed, which is a standard procedure for companies when there is a potential sanctions issue or unusual activity detected. Here's how you might respond:

---

Subject: Response to Identity Verification Request

Hello,

Thank you for bringing this matter to my attention. 

I would like to inform you that I have decided to cancel my subscription and no longer wish to use Vultr’s services. Therefore, I will not be proceeding with the identity verification process.

I have already submitted a cancellation request, as you may see in my previous email communications, and I would like your assistance in forwarding this decision to the relevant departments within your company.

I understand the importance of compliance with international sanctions and appreciate your need to validate identities in certain cases. Since I am discontinuing my use of Vultr’s services, please proceed with my account cancellation as per my previous request.

Thank you for your understanding and assistance in this matter. I await confirmation that my account will be canceled and that no further action is needed from my end regarding the verification process.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Vultr Account Email Address]

---

By sending this response, you reaffirm your decision to cancel your subscription with Vultr and clarify that you do not intend to complete the identity verification process as you are ending your relationship with the company. If they've specifically given you a 48-hour timeframe, it’s important to send your response promptly to avoid unnecessary complications or service interruptions. Make sure to monitor your emails for further instructions regarding the cancellation or any other steps you need to take.
as per my previous request., that is not previous , they sent this letter , before i request, but i did not asnwer to this before

I apologize for the confusion. If their request for additional information due to the sanctions issue came before your cancellation request, and you did not respond to it earlier, your message should be amended accordingly. Here's a revised version of the email:

---

Subject: Request for Account Cancellation and Response to Verification Requirement

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to me with the request for identity verification due to activity observed from a sanctioned country.

I would like to clarify that I have no intention of continuing to use Vultr's services, and as such, I will not be going through the identity verification process. As a result, I am formally requesting the cancellation of my Vultr subscription and the closure of my account.

Please understand that my decision to cancel the subscription is final, and I do not wish to provide additional personal information for identity verification related to sanctions compliance for an account I intend to close.

Considering this, I kindly ask you to proceed with the cancellation of my services with immediate effect. Please let me know if there is any further information you require from me to finalize this process.

Awaiting confirmation of my account cancellation.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Vultr Account Email Address]

---

This email clearly states that you are requesting a cancellation of your services and that you won't be completing the identity verification process due to this decision. You will need to wait for their response to confirm the next steps in the cancellation process.

they also were sent to me this ,SUSPENSION WARNING: Please respond within 24 hours with the requested info to avoid an interruption in service.

Review and fill out the following authorization form: https://my.vultr.com/billing/auth_form/ , before i send them cancelation request

Given the suspension warning and request for information came before your decision to cancel, it's important to address the situation directly when contacting Vultr's support. Whether or not you intend to provide the requested information, clearly communicating your intentions will be vital. Here's how you could draft your email under these circumstances:

---

Subject: Account Cancellation Request - No Verification Due to Service Termination

Hello,

I am writing in response to the recent communications regarding verification due to activity from a sanctioned country and the subsequent suspension warning that requested a response within 24 hours.

Please note that I have decided not to continue with Vultr’s services and thereby wish to cancel my account. Considering this, I will not be proceeding with the identity verification through the provided authorization form, as I am requesting to terminate my services immediately.

I understand the importance of compliance measures, but as I no longer require the services and intend to cease using the account, I prefer to move forward with the cancellation rather than providing additional personal documentation.

I ask that you acknowledge this email as my formal cancellation request and process it accordingly. Please inform me of any necessary steps I need to take to finalize the account termination. As mentioned in your suspension warning, I am responding within the requested timeframe and hope to resolve this matter without service interruption, given my intent to cancel.

I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and await a confirmation that my account will be canceled accordingly.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Vultr Account Email Address]

---

In sending this response within the 24-hour window specified in the suspension warning, you are making it clear that you are aware of their communications and are choosing to cancel your services with Vultr, therefore removing the need for further action regarding the verification process. Be sure to monitor your emails closely for their reply and any final steps required from you for the account termination.

We're sorry to see you go.
Why are you closing your account?
Price
Server or Network performance issues
I need managed support
You're missing a feature I need
I'm no longer using the service
Other
There are 2 tickets open for your account. Please be aware that closing your account will also immediately close all open tickets associated with your account.
View open tickets

The message you've received appears to be a form or survey designed to collect feedback about why customers choose to close their accounts. Here's how you might respond based on what you've shared:

1. Select the reason(s) that most closely match why you're leaving. If none of the preset reasons fit, you can choose "Other," and if there's a comment box available, provide a brief explanation.
   
   Here's an example explanation for "Other":
   - "I have decided to close my account due to compliance and verification processes that I prefer not to engage with at this time."

2. If there's an option to "View open tickets," you may want to consider doing so to make sure there's nothing pending that needs your attention before the account is closed.

3. Complete any additional required steps or confirmations to finalize the closure of your account.

Here's how you can communicate this in a formal response back to Vultr, assuming they require one:

---

Subject: Account Closure Confirmation and Feedback

Hello,

I have made the decision to close my Vultr account. The reason for closing my account is as follows: [select the reason from the options provided or summarize your own reason].

Regarding the message about the two open tickets associated with my account, I am aware that closing my account will also close these tickets. I am fine with that and have no further issues to resolve through these tickets.

Please proceed with the closure of my account and confirm once this has been completed.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Vultr Account Email Address]

---

Remember to check if there are any additional steps you need to take as prescribed by Vultr's account closing process. If you're uncertain or have further questions, be sure to reach out to their support team for clarification.

It seems that this is another alert from Vultr's System Admins Team, reminding you of the requirement to provide identification due to logins from a sanctioned country. As mentioned in previous communications, you have decided to cancel your service with Vultr and not to proceed with the verification process.

To close all open tickets related to your account and cancel your Vultr subscription as per your earlier decision, you should reply to the email with your request for cancellation, reiterating that you do not wish to provide additional identification. Here is a sample response you could use:

---

Subject: Cancellation Request and No Verification Due to Account Termination - Ticket FGD-81IOO

Hello,

Thank you for contacting me regarding Ticket FGD-81IOO.

I would like to confirm that my intention is to cancel my subscription with Vultr and close my account. Consequently, I will not be providing the requested verification information (government ID and credit card) due to my decision to cease using Vultr's services. I respectfully decline to go through the verification process as my account will no longer be active.

Please accept this email as my formal request to cancel all services and terminate my account with Vultr. Additionally, please close all open tickets, including Ticket FGD-81IOO, associated with my account as I no longer require assistance.

I understand the seriousness of the compliance measures that Vultr must adhere to, but since I am ending my business with Vultr, verification is no longer applicable.

I request confirmation that my account has been canceled along with the closure of any related tickets. No further services are expected, and I assure you that I will not be accessing the Vultr services in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Vultr Account Email Address]

---

Make sure to send this email well within the 48-hour response window they've provided. Keep a copy for your records and follow up if you do not receive a timely confirmation of your account cancellation.

how i cancel my vultr account

To cancel your Vultr account, you'll typically want to do the following:

1. **Log in to Your Vultr Account:**
   - Go to the Vultr website (https://www.vultr.com/) and log in with your account details.

2. **Navigate to Account Settings:**
   - Look for an account settings or profile settings option in the dashboard, where you might find account management options.

3. **Find the Cancellation Option:**
   - Look for a 'Cancel Account' or 'Close Account' link or button within the settings. The exact terminology may vary.

4. **Complete the Cancellation Process:**
   - Follow the prompts to confirm the cancellation. You may be asked for a reason for leaving and to provide feedback. Ensure you read and understand the terms regarding cancellation, including data deletion and billing.

5. **Submit a Support Ticket:**
   - If there's no direct way to cancel from within your dashboard, or you need help, you might have to submit a support ticket. You can typically do this by navigating to the 'Support' or 'Help' section of the site.
   - State clearly in your ticket that you wish to cancel your account and ask them for any further instructions.

6. **Backup Your Data:**
   - Before finalizing the cancellation, back up any data you wish to keep because once the account is closed, you may lose access to the data stored on Vultr's servers.

7. **Cancel Any Active Subscriptions:**
   - If you have any active instances or services, make sure to stop and/or destroy these from the dashboard to prevent further charges.

8. **Check for Email Confirmation:**
   - After requesting the cancellation, check your email (including spam/junk folders) for any confirmation or further instructions.

Please note that the specific steps may vary, and Vultr's interface or policies may change over time. If the above steps do not match the current Vultr interface, the best course of action is to reach out directly to Vultr's support.

You can typically contact Vultr support either through a support ticket system within your dashboard or by using the 'Support' or 'Contact Us' links often found at the bottom of the website. Alternatively, you can directly email their support at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> mentioning that you wish to cancel your account.

Remember to keep all correspondence polite, clear, and concise for the quickest resolution, and ensure that you understand any implications of cancellation, such as data loss and billing cessation.

Based on the email you received, it seems that your account associated with the email <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> has been successfully closed by Vultr's support team.

There is nothing you need to do if this closure is what you intended. However, if the closure is an error or you have changed your mind, you should contact Vultr immediately at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> to explain the situation and request that they reinstate your account.

Since you are seeking a confirmation in email form, below is a template you can use to confirm the cancellation back to Vultr or to query any potential errors:

---

Subject: Confirmation of Account Closure - [Your Account Email]

Hello Vultr.com Support Team,

I am writing to confirm the receipt of your email stating that my account associated with <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> has been closed.

[If you agree with the closure and it was intentional:]
I confirm that this action is intentional and in line with my request. I appreciate your prompt assistance in this matter, and I thank you for the services provided up to this point.

[If the closure was not intentional or an error:]
However, I believe there has been a misunderstanding as I did not request an account closure. Please could you reinstate my account as soon as possible and provide further clarification on why this action was taken.

Thank you for your support. [Optional: Let them know if you have enjoyed the service and may consider returning in the future.]

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

---

Choose the appropriate section in brackets to match your situation. If the closure is confirmed and all is in order, you may not need to respond. If there was an error or you need further assistance, use the email template to quickly get in touch with Vultr support. Always make sure to keep records of all your communications for future reference.
